name: Fritto Misto
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the seafood.
2. Sprinkle with lemon juice and salt.
3. Dust with about 3 tablespoons of flour.
4. In a small bowl, sift remaining 3/4 cup flour and a pinch of salt.
5. Blend in water and olive oil. Allow to stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
6. Fold in beaten egg whites.
7. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C) in an electric skillet.
8. Dip seafood in batter and fry a few pieces at a time for 1 minute, or until golden.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Keep warm in a 200°F (93°C) oven until all are cooked.
